mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, o.contract_id, o.total_amount, o.discount_amount, o.actual_amount, o.status, o.paid_amount, o.payment_count, o.last_payment_time, o.source, o.del_flag, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark, o.belong_user_id, o.belong_dept_id, c.customer_name from crm_order o left join crm_customer c on o.customer_id = c.customer_id
mapper.insert:
insert into crm_order
order_id, order_no, customer_id, contract_id, total_amount, discount_amount, actual_amount, status, paid_amount, payment_count, last_payment_time, source, belong_user_id, belong_dept_id, create_by, remark, create_time
#{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{contractId}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{actualAmount}, #{status}, #{paidAmount}, #{paymentCount}, #{lastPaymentTime}, #{source}, #{belongUserId}, #{belongDeptId}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate()
mapper.update:
update crm_order set del_flag = '2' where order_id in
#{orderId}
update crm_order set payment_count = payment_count + 1, last_payment_time = #{lastPaymentTime}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId}
update crm_order set customer_id = #{newId}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{oldId}
